# F048 Non-Exact Action Contract

## Decision
`F048_NON_EXACT_ACTION_OPERATOR_STILL_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F047 found that held-out perturbation rows have no exact action matches but do have shared program-action support. F048 removes exact perturbation one-hot action columns and retests the floor-initialized operator wrapper using only non-exact program action descriptors.

## Key Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.050000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- active gates pass: `False`
- selected transition: `0.002455`
- program local floor transition: `0.002384`
- selected delta cosine: `0.415296`
- program local floor delta cosine: `0.414301`
- selected recall@1: `0.362963`
- program local floor recall@1: `0.355556`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.000071` (min `-0.000151`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.000995` (min `-0.001588`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.007407` (min `0.000000`)
- max broken retrieval rows: `0`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F048 is a diagnostic-only frozen-latent action-contract branch.
